exemplar.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

detailedExemplarData.title: What role does imagination play in producing knowledge about the world?

strengths: Clear identification and quotation of the TOK prompt, maintaining focus throughout.
Use of three specific real-world objects with concrete contexts (Interstellar still, Percy Jackson boxed set, Mein Kampf copy).
Inclusion of a Works Cited section and appropriate references demonstrating academic rigor.
weaknesses: Linking and justification across objects is unevenâPercy Jackson analysis is overly personal and Mein Kampf lacks evidence.
Analysis often consists of assertions without critical depth, counter-claims, or consistent TOK terminology.
Several sections are incomplete or abruptly end mid-thought, and citation formatting is inconsistent.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission meets the requirements for Band 5â6 by clearly identifying three specific objects and explaining their links to the IA prompt. Technical detail in the Interstellar discussion shows strength, and sources are cited transparently. However, the uneven quality of analysisâsuperficial claims in the Percy Jackson section, insufficient evidence in the Mein Kampf discussion, interrupted arguments and lack of TOK vocabularyâprevents a higher band. Given these mixed strengths and weaknesses, a mid-band score of 5 appropriately reflects the studentâs performance.

annotations.comment: The prompt is clearly identified and directly quoted, ensuring focus on the TOK question throughout.
Consider adding a concise thesis statement immediately after quoting the prompt to preview the three chosen objects and their TOK relevance.
The introduction defines imagination broadly but does not preview the specific objects or their contexts to anchor the analysis.
The inclusion of a specific film still from âInterstellarâ grounds the discussion in a tangible real-world context, enhancing relevance.
This section provides detailed background on the scientific collaboration behind âGargantuaâ, illustrating how imagination and data synthesize to produce novel knowledge.
The paragraph ends abruptly with âThis showcases howâ, indicating incomplete analysis. Complete the thought to clarify the link between imagination and knowledge production.
Integrate TOK vocabulary such as âways of knowingâ or âjustificationâ when discussing scientific modelling to deepen conceptual analysis.
The concluding sentence for Object 1 is overly general and repeats previous claims without adding new insight. Refine it to introduce the next object.
The conclusion ties the Interstellar example back to the broader TOK premise, reinforcing the interdependency between imagination and theoretical growth.
The personal photograph of the Percy Jackson collection demonstrates a specific real-world object, satisfying the requirement for concrete context.
The justification for Object 2 relies heavily on personal reaction and lacks concrete evidence linking imagination to knowledge production in the series.
The sentence ends mid-thought (âultimately, producing a fantasticalâ), indicating incomplete analysis. Finish it to fully convey the idea.
The analysis of Percy Jackson lacks engagement with counterclaims or alternative perspectives on imaginationâs role, limiting critical depth.
The student acknowledges limitations of imagination in literature, demonstrating awareness of counterclaims which strengthens the TOK argument.
Object 3 is clearly identified with precise real-world context, aligning well with the IA prompt requirements.
Provide more contextual detail in the caption for 'Mein Kampf' (e.g., edition, publication date) to deepen the real-world connection.
The claim that Hitler âutilises imagination to persuadeâ lacks specific examples or citations from the text; include quotes to support the analysis.
The opening of the final Object 3 discussion reiterates prior ideas without introducing fresh insight; reframe to highlight new TOK implications.
Break this dense paragraph into two discussionsâone on imaginative rhetoric, one on ethical implicationsâfor improved clarity.
This paragraph effectively synthesizes how imagination can produce both beneficial and harmful knowledge, showcasing nuanced TOK understanding.
The final conclusion is overly simplistic; explicitly reference all three objects to demonstrate how imaginationâs role varies across contexts.
A dedicated Works Cited section demonstrates academic rigor and supports transparency of sources.
Standardize citation formatting (e.g., italics for titles) to adhere consistently to a recognized style guide such as MLA or APA.
The URL in citation 2 breaks across lines, compromising readability; ensure proper formatting or use a DOI when available.
Verify and include full publisher details for Riordanâs Percy Jackson citation to improve bibliographic accuracy.
The citation for âMein Kampfâ lacks translator or edition details, reducing reliability; include complete bibliographic information.
Expand the object label to include its TOK significance, for example: âObject 1: Interstellarâs Gargantua and its epistemic implications.â

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
